title: error due to no-timescale on primitive

features.name: UDP primitive with preceding timescale in celldefine block
features.description: Code should include a UDP (User Defined Primitive) definition inside a celldefine/endcelldefine block, with a `timescale directive preceding the primitive declaration

features.name: UDP primitive instantiation in module with timescale
features.description: Code should include a module with a `timescale directive that instantiates a UDP primitive defined in a separate library file
